title: Vanilla Durability Tooltip [BTW Addon]
description: Shows item durability in tooltip, for Better Than Wolves
body:
# Vanilla Durability Tooltip (Better Than Wolves addon)
- Restores the vanilla Minecraft durability tooltip when hovering over items, with no need for F3+H.

![sharp stone shown with 6 / 8 durability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a11c518ab6bb111bd68376b2723d874a44c27ba4.png)

## Source:
https://github.com/maromalo/vanilla-durability-tooltip-btw
